title: Chapter 112
content:
Chapter 112: Iferaski Licks Fullru All Over

"That tickles, Iferaski. Ah, nnh..."

Because Fullru’s words lacked any clear refusal, Iferaski continued licking the wine pooled in Fullru’s navel with the tip of her tongue.

Twitch, twitch.

Fullru’s belly quivered in small, intense spasms like a girl who had just had her cervix pressed against and been creampied.

Aah, that smooth, loli-like flat belly... I wanna touch it so bad...

It looks so silky smooth.

I want to stroke it all over. I want to rub my cheek against it...

But interfering with yuri is a grave sin. I’ll just watch.

Iferaski was licking the wine with clear enjoyment. I’m so jealous. Her long tongue completely filled Fullru’s tiny navel.

Lick lick.

There couldn’t have been much wine pooled in her navel, so it should have disappeared quickly.

But.

Lick lick. Lick lick.

Iferaski was licking very carefully and thoroughly.

I see.

Even though it was only a small amount, wine kept flowing down her white skin, so the taste never really went away.

Lick lick... Lick... Lick...

Her licking gradually became gentler.

Instead of digging into the inside of the navel, she switched to slowly, lewdly stroking the outer rim.

The wine flavor had probably thinned out by now.

Twitch twitch.

Iferaski’s nose moved.

She slightly lifted her face, then began licking from Fullru’s belly upward toward her chest.

I see.

The wine had spilled from her mouth and drawn a red line downward, so Iferaski was licking it all back up in the opposite direction.

"Nnh... That tickles. Hey, it tickles."

Fullru’s knees moved up and down slightly.

I circled around to the foot of the bed and peered between her thighs.

Should I watch her embarrassed reaction to having her belly licked?

Or should I focus on a possible pussy flash?

There are too many good spots! I don’t know where to look!

But then—

"Ah!"

Fullru’s tone suddenly changed. I reflexively looked up.

That damn Iferaski! She’s sucking on Fullru’s nipple!

I quickly moved to the head of the bed and changed my observation point.

This was something I couldn’t miss.

Chupa, chupa.

"...?"

Huh?

She stopped sucking almost immediately.

Iferaski lifted her face with a dissatisfied expression.

What’s wrong, Iferaski?

What happened?

I couldn’t tell exactly where the nipple was because her breasts were small and the areolas light, but you definitely latched on, didn’t you?

Did you lose it?

Why did you stop sucking?

Fullru’s nipple, still wet with Iferaski’s saliva, quivered as if begging "Suck more!" Come on, suck it more!

"Ah, nnh..."

Iferaski started licking Fullru’s neck instead.

...O-Oh, right!

Iferaski had probably expected something tasty from Fullru’s breasts, like Rafilia-san’s breast milk.

But Fullru doesn’t produce milk, so it wasn’t delicious?

I’d happily lick them in her place.

But interfering in yuri time is a grave sin...!

My dick is rock hard. I wanna stroke it so bad...!

But right now is precious yuri-watching time.

There’s an unmissable scene coming up soon.

Because if Iferaski traces the wine trail upward from the navel, she’ll reach the mouth.

There was a bit of wine on the corner of Fullru’s lips, staining them red.

Go on, Iferaski!

Go for it! I leaned in from the head of the bed to get a better view.

"...!"

Iferaski’s gaze locked onto the corner of Fullru’s lips.

And then—

Lick lick lick.

Yes! She’s licking!

Her tongue looked like it was touching the lips too. That’s basically a yuri kiss.

Fullru didn’t seem to mind at all and was even laughing, saying "It tickles, doesn’t it?"

Hey, when Fullru opened her mouth to speak, didn’t Iferaski’s tongue slip inside?

That’s a deep kiss! This is fantastic.

The greedy Iferaski even caught Fullru’s lower lip between her own and started sucking on it.

So erotic...

She keeps sucking my morning wood even after I cum, so Iferaski really loves sucking, huh.

Fullru offered almost no resistance and let it happen.

Her cheeks were flushed, so she probably felt some special meaning in the lip contact.

Lick lick, lick lick.

Iferaski pulled her mouth away with a satisfied look.

Fullru’s cheeks were lightly dyed as she stared off into space, probably processing her thoughts.

I only came to deliver food, but I got to see something great this morning.

I figured wine alone wouldn’t fill her stomach, so I offered Fullru a sausage, but she said "Not needed."

It wasn’t out of politeness, nor because she lacked hunger and couldn’t understand appetite. It seemed like she could genuinely live for a whole day on the nutrients from one cup of wine.

Well, if she gets malnourished, I can always feed her my semen elixir through her ass.

Instead, Iferaski and I ate the sausage together from both ends at the same time.

I thought our lips might touch, but the greedy Iferaski sucked it all away with incredible force and ate the whole thing.

I started it thinking it would be like the Pocky Game, but her suction power was no joke.

That explains her incredible blowjob strength too.

Now, it was pee time.

Fullru was fidgeting.

She probably found it hard to say outright. She kept sending me glances that said "Read the room."

I gave Fullru a big nod, then turned to Iferaski.

"Iferaski, you’re going to the toilet, right?"

"..."

She nodded.

"Everyone has to pee after drinking something, right?"

"..."

"Elves pee too. But this girl still can’t walk on her own."

"...!"

She nodded strongly. It seemed my message got through.

Iferaski turned her back to the bed and crouched down. She was probably saying "Get on, I’ll carry you to the toilet."

"The ceiling is low. If you carry someone you’ll hit your head, won’t you?"

"...!"

"Taking her to the toilet is impossible. So what do you do?"

"...!"

Iferaski moved to Fullru’s lower body side, brought her face close to her crotch, and waited.

"Yes. That’s the correct answer! To realize it instantly... As expected, you’re a genius."

Horse girls really are smart! Sometimes I think Iferaski is a bit of an idiot, but she’s just honest with her desires—her intelligence is actually high!

"U-Um, Masharu..."

"I’m not always around. Do you hate being drunk by Iferaski?"

"I-I don’t know... Yesterday with you was the first time anyone ever drank my pee..."

"Did you hate it?"

"It was embarrassing... but I didn’t really hate it..."

"Then it’s fine if Iferaski drinks it too, right?"

"...Yeah."

"Alright. Then it’s settled. I’ll watch over you, so go ahead!"

I get to watch a yuri scene of an elf getting her piss drunk by a horse girl live? What a privilege!
